title: Xiaohongshu Minimal Knowledge Card Series AI
sourceTitle: Xiaohongshu Minimal Knowledge Card Series AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Set of six independent 3:4 Xiaohongshu minimal knowledge cards for 表达变清楚的5个信号, using a fixed Apple-like white-paper editorial layout. Subject: 先讲结论, 少用抽象词, 给一个具体例子, 确认对方理解, 留下下一步 become the reusable card-level ideas, with each idea turned into one separate vertical card using a short main title, concise body copy, orange number, and restrained visual symbol area. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed six-card series system: generate six separate 3:4 images, never one combined board; each card has an orange number at top left, small subtitle at top right, main title in the upper half, short clear body text below, and a pale gray visual-symbol zone at the bottom. Signature Elements: Six independent cards, 表达变清楚的5个信号, 先讲结论, 少用抽象词, 给一个具体例子, 确认对方理解, 留下下一步, orange top-left numbers, top-right subtitles, upper-half title placement, short body copy, bottom light-gray symbol zone, abundant blank space, and restrained Apple-style knowledge design. Style: Apple-like minimalist Xiaohongshu knowledge-card design with premium magazine restraint, precise spacing, cool white paper, sharp hierarchy, calm editorial rhythm, and polished save-worthy social-card finish. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Flat clean digital-paper lighting with subtle page shadow, crisp text contrast, and airy white-space clarity. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Set of six independent 3:4 Xiaohongshu minimal knowledge cards for 把观点说清楚的5个步骤, using a fixed Apple-like white-paper editorial layout. Subject: 写下判断, 找到原因, 删掉废话, 补一个场景, 用一句话收束 become the reusable card-level ideas, with each idea turned into one separate vertical card using a short main title, concise body copy, orange number, and restrained visual symbol area. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed six-card series system: generate six separate 3:4 images, never one combined board; each card has an orange number at top left, small subtitle at top right, main title in the upper half, short clear body text below, and a pale gray visual-symbol zone at the bottom. Style: Apple-like minimalist Xiaohongshu knowledge-card design with premium magazine restraint, precise spacing, cool white paper, sharp hierarchy, calm editorial rhythm, and polished save-worthy social-card finish.
